mapper.sql: n.id, n.title, n.content, n.publisher_id, n.status, n.published_at, n.created_at, n.updated_at, n.search_version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, publisher_id, status, published_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId}, #{status}, #{publishedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, search_version = search_version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
UPDATE notice SET status = 'DELETED', search_version = search_version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
mapper.select: SELECT search_version FROM notice WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT FROM notice n WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT , CASE WHEN nr.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS is_read, nr.read_at FROM notice n LEFT JOIN notice_read nr ON nr.notice_id = n.id AND nr.employee_id = #{employeeId} WHERE n.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY n.published_at DESC, n.id DESC

SELECT , CASE WHEN nr.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS is_read, nr.read_at FROM notice n LEFT JOIN notice_read nr ON nr.notice_id = n.id AND nr.employee_id = #{employeeId} WHERE n.id = #{noticeId} AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice n WHERE n.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notice_read nr WHERE nr.notice_id = n.id AND nr.employee_id = #{employeeId} )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED'
SELECT FROM notice n WHERE n.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY n.published_at DESC, n.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
